holdings.infoBox: PY is an equity ETF with a total of 99 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.33%, Amazon.com at 3.22%, Walmart at 2.52%, Bank of America at 2.15%, and UnitedHealth Group at 2.04%.

overview.description: The Principal Value ETF (PY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund utilizes a proprietary quantitative model to actively invest in large- and mid-cap companies that exhibit higher degrees of shareholder yield. PY was launched on Mar 21, 2016 and is issued by Principal.
